title: What is Evangelion Anima 3 years later
display_title: What is Evangelion Anima 3 years later
wikitext:
[]: What is "Evangelion Anima: 3 years later"? Post by V » Mon Jul 21, 2008 10:19 am I keep seeing these pics posted for "Eva Anima: 3 years later". At first I assumed it was an unofficial doujinshi series, but then I saw a Gainax copyright on the bottom of some pics....does that mean this is an officially licensed spinoff, or what?

[]: Post by The Bastard King » Mon Jul 21, 2008 10:25 am Isn't Anima the official AU novel series that presumes that the JSSDF attack never happened and goes on into the future? Or something? Needs moar English translation.

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Jul 21, 2008 6:07 pm Hi, see this thread here on the same page? http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3429
